codex-coproxy-recovery.why: Local Codex/Coproxy recovery has specific logs, ports, and verification steps.

source-reading-site-builder.why: Repeated source-reading site creation has a reusable research, outline, docs, and render-validation workflow.

paper-reading-archive.pattern: \b(arxiv|论文|paper-reading|读这篇文章|接着读文章|HF paper|Hugging Face paper)\b
paper-reading-archive.why: Paper reading repeatedly needs identity confirmation, local archive folders, Chinese notes, and follow-up tracking.

project-promotion-distribution.pattern: \b(linux\.do|宣传|推广|trending|分发|渠道|hashtag|推荐策略|GitHub trending)\b
project-promotion-distribution.why: Project promotion combines repo evidence, channel fit, public copy, and distribution checks.

github-ci-release.why: Release repair has repeated CI inspection, versioning, changelog, and verification steps.

remote-service-exposure.why: Remote service work needs reachability distinctions and host/port verification.

wechat-wxcli-real-data.pattern: \b(WeChat|wx cli)\b|微信(?!/HN)|AgentHub 群聊|数据库密钥|小号|聊天记录
wechat-wxcli-real-data.why: WeChat local-data workflows need privacy handling, account/container selection, and real-data validation.

frontend-regression-verification.why: Frontend regression work repeatedly needs screenshot/log reading and browser verification.

skill-lifecycle-management.why: Skill install, audit, generation, personalization, and publication are the repo's core lifecycle.
